capabilities.name: Lists & segmentation
capabilities.verify: manage_newsletter_subscribers skill; subscriber tab in NewsletterPage
capabilities.notes: Single subscriber list only — no segmentation anywhere (no segment skill, table, or UI).

capabilities.name: Newsletter templates
capabilities.verify: no reusable template skill or UI; block-based editor (newsletter/blocks extensions) is content, not templates

capabilities.name: Scheduled sends
capabilities.verify: Schedule/Cancel-schedule dialog on drafts in NewsletterPage.tsx; schedule_at param on send_newsletter/manage_newsletters; newsletter/dispatch-scheduled route + pg_cron 'newsletter-dispatch-scheduled' (*/5) — migration 20260707022750
capabilities.notes: Full loop built 2026-07-07 (UI was missing AND nothing dispatched due sends). E2E-verified on live dev: overdue scheduled campaign picked up by the dispatcher, sent to 3 subscribers, logged in outbound_communications, status→sent. NB cron must send the NEW-format publishable key — legacy JWT anon key gets a silent 401 from the handler.

capabilities.name: Open/click stats
capabilities.verify: open_count tracked in newsletter-send edge fn and shown in NewsletterPage
capabilities.notes: Open tracking only — no click tracking on either surface.

capabilities.name: Unsubscribe management
capabilities.verify: manage_newsletter_subscribers remove action; NewsletterManagePage.tsx + newsletter-gdpr edge fn

capabilities.name: A/B testing
capabilities.verify: no A/B test skill, schema or UI (NewsletterPage 'variant' hits are Badge props)

capabilities.name: Drip/automation flows
capabilities.verify: lead_nurture_sequence skill (welcome/re-engage/upsell); Flows tab in NewsletterPage.tsx — lists agent_automations (skill_name=lead_nurture_sequence), enable toggle, New-flow dialog with 3 presets (event lead.created / cron / event order.completed), executor='platform'
capabilities.notes: Management UI added 2026-07-07 (was skill-only). Presets create disabled-by-default automations; dispatch rides the proven automation-dispatcher/event-dispatcher machinery (same as inbound_email_to_ticket). End-to-end enrollment on a real lead.created event not yet exercised.

capabilities.name: Public subscribe (widget + skill)
capabilities.verify: newsletter_subscribe skill (scope external) + newsletter-subscribe edge fn; signup rendered via public blocks
